title: Bing / IndexNow Safe Check

bing_webmaster.action: Check if Bing Webmaster Tools account exists for qfinhub.com. If yes: submit sitemap. If no: create account (free) and submit.

indexnow.action: IndexNow is supported by Next.js but requires key file at root. Check if /.well-known/indexnow API key file exists. If no: can add with low effort.

recommendation: Bing/IndexNow are safe, free, and low-effort. Configure if possible. Do NOT require Qasem manual work — Hermes can set up if tokens/keys exist.
